description.value:
Used as a replacement for skills rolled with base COOL, EMP, or WILL

Used for rolling in checks which involve force of will, charisma, general intelligence, or intution. Note that if the check is specialized and the mook is not, the DV should be raised 1-3 tiers.

Used as a replacement for fighting or ranged weapon skills, excluding evasion. Note that this uses REF as a base for reasons involving initiative - set REF of the mook first, then consider that number when considering the Martial skill.
Used as a replacement for skills which rely on base Body or Dex, which are not covered by the Martial skill, and for Evasion.
Used for skills which rely on base INT or TECH.

information.notes:
Mook Tier - Tier 2x/Specialized Troublemaker - You wouldn't think they were a threat… until you're neck deep in mud and one's burrowing into your stomach.

Corp-Wide Ability - Augmented physiology: Creatures with this ability can see in the dark. After making an attack, creatures with this ability can immediately take another action (it can't be to make a normal or aimed attack).

Ability - Ground Mammal: Choose one;

--S.I.M.P. Program: A small mammal suited for climbing, like a squirrel. It does not need to use extra movement while climbing; when attacking, it may enter the same space as the target, its attacks ignore all of the target's armor, and it does not need to roll to hit if doing so. When attacking the forager under those circumstances, all attacks against it suffer a -3 penalty if they aren't aimed shots; on miss, the other target in the space is hit instead.

--Burrower Program: A small subterranean mammal, like a groundhog or rat. For each burrower in a scene, create a 2m/2m wide patch of unmarked unstable ground; if stepped on, a 1-2 meter deep pit opens as the burrow collapses, burying whatever stepped on it. These pits can be found before stepping on them with a DV17 Perception check.

Aww, look at how fuzzy it is. Now kill it, before it gets away.
